question.question: If they keep dismissing staff concerns, the dispute {a1} well beyond the campus.

source.name: Custom: Will vs Be Going To All Levels (C1)

tag.name: Will vs Be Going To All Levels

variants.text: If they keep dismissing staff concerns, the dispute {a1} well beyond the campus.

hints.hint:
Form: **will + base verb**.
In warnings about a likely consequence, this pattern uses **will**.
Example: *If they keep dismissing staff concerns, the dispute will escalate well beyond the campus.*

Forma: **will + czasownik w formie podstawowej**.
W ostrzeżeniach o prawdopodobnej konsekwencji w tym modelu używamy **will**.
Przykład: *If they keep dismissing staff concerns, the dispute will escalate well beyond the campus.*

Форма: **will + V1**.
У попередженнях про ймовірний наслідок у цій моделі використовується **will**.
Приклад: *If they keep dismissing staff concerns, the dispute will escalate well beyond the campus.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: If they keep dismissing staff concerns, the dispute {a1} well beyond the campus.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
❌ "escalates" does not match the future form required in this sentence.
Example: *If they keep dismissing staff concerns, the dispute will escalate well beyond the campus.*
